## 测试方式

请勾选或补充实际验证过的项目：

- [ ] `mvn -q -DskipTests compile`
- [ ] `.\scripts\demo_check.ps1`
- [ ] `.\scripts\smoke_test.ps1`
- [ ] `.\scripts\smoke_test.ps1 -LlmTest`
- [ ] `.\scripts\smoke_test.ps1 -SubtitleTranslateTest`
- [ ] 手动验证 `test_frontend.html`
- [ ] 手动验证 `realtime_demo.html`
